lines.english: What evidence is there of a ghost?
lines.raw: What evidence is there of a ghost? | 有什么证据证明有鬼？

lines.english: A public house which was recently bought by Mr.Ian Thompson is up for sale.
lines.chinese: 伊恩·汤普森先生最近购买的一家酒吧正在出售。
lines.raw: A public house which was recently bought by Mr.Ian Thompson is up for sale. | 伊恩·汤普森先生最近购买的一家酒吧正在出售。

lines.english: Mr.Thompson is going to sell it because it is haunted.
lines.chinese: 汤普森先生打算出售它，因为它闹鬼。
lines.raw: Mr.Thompson is going to sell it because it is haunted. | 汤普森先生打算出售它，因为它闹鬼。

lines.english: He told me that he could not go to sleep one night
lines.chinese: 他告诉我，一天晚上他无法入睡
lines.raw: He told me that he could not go to sleep one night | 他告诉我，一天晚上他无法入睡

lines.english: because he heard a strange noise coming from the bar.
lines.chinese: 因为他听到酒吧里传来奇怪的声音。
lines.raw: because he heard a strange noise coming from the bar. | 因为他听到酒吧里传来奇怪的声音。
The next morning, | 第二天早上，

lines.english: he found that the doors had been blocked by chairs and the furniture had been moved.
lines.chinese: 他发现门被椅子堵住了，家具也被挪动了。
lines.raw: he found that the doors had been blocked by chairs and the furniture had been moved. | 他发现门被椅子堵住了，家具也被挪动了。

lines.english: Though Mr.Thompson had turned the lights off before he went to bed,
lines.chinese: 虽然汤普森先生睡前关了灯，
lines.raw: Though Mr.Thompson had turned the lights off before he went to bed, | 虽然汤普森先生睡前关了灯，

lines.english: they were on in the morning.
lines.raw: they were on in the morning. | 但早上却亮着。

lines.english: He also said that he had found five empty whisky bottles
lines.chinese: 他还说他发现了五个空威士忌酒瓶，
lines.raw: He also said that he had found five empty whisky bottles | 他还说他发现了五个空威士忌酒瓶，

lines.english: which the ghost must have drunk the night before.
lines.chinese: 一定是那个鬼前一天晚上喝光的。
lines.raw: which the ghost must have drunk the night before. | 一定是那个鬼前一天晚上喝光的。

lines.english: When I suggested that some villagers must have come
lines.chinese: 当我暗示说一定是一些村民过来
lines.raw: When I suggested that some villagers must have come | 当我暗示说一定是一些村民过来

lines.english: in for a free drink, Mr.Thompson shook his head.
lines.chinese: 免费喝酒时，汤普森先生摇了摇头。
lines.raw: in for a free drink, Mr.Thompson shook his head. | 免费喝酒时，汤普森先生摇了摇头。

lines.english: The villagers have told him that
lines.raw: The villagers have told him that | 村民们告诉他，

lines.english: they will not accept the pub even if he gives it away.
lines.chinese: 即使他白送，他们也不会接受那家酒吧。
lines.raw: they will not accept the pub even if he gives it away. | 即使他白送，他们也不会接受那家酒吧。
